raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised draft engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.3": "The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.6": "The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, improving writing polish.",
    "RX.1": "While the revised draft flags uncertainty for some claims, it does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The revised output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), adhering to scope requirements.",
    "RX.4": "Although the revised output is harm-free, it introduces minor regressions in terms of cadence robustness and failure mode characterization.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change in the revised draft is annotated with source and reason, ensuring provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.95,
    "R1.6": 0.92,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised draft engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.3: The revised draft audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The revised draft reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, improving writing polish.
rationale.RX.1: While the revised draft flags uncertainty for some claims, it does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The revised output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), adhering to scope requirements.
rationale.RX.4: Although the revised output is harm-free, it introduces minor regressions in terms of cadence robustness and failure mode characterization.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the revised draft is annotated with source and reason, ensuring provenance and traceability.
